svg.title: RAG system architecture with LangGraph and Qdrant
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing user query flowing through LangGraph nodes: Redis cache check, embedding via Ollama, Qdrant retrieval, generation, and Postgres checkpointing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user interface look like for a RAG app?')
sendPrompt('How does the Redis cache layer work in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What gets stored in the Redis cache?')
sendPrompt('Which Ollama embedding model should I use for RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does Qdrant vector similarity search work?')
sendPrompt('Which Ollama model works best for RAG generation?')
sendPrompt('What TTL should I set for the Redis RAG cache?')
sendPrompt('How does LangGraph Postgres checkpointing work?')
sendPrompt('How should I format the final RAG response?')
